name: hearth
description: A local-first autonomous coding agent for VS Code powered by Ollama (qwen3:14b), with an optional cloud fallback. Live task plan, streamed replies, granular permissions, 100% local by default.
author: Promilek

enumDescriptions: Run fully locally against your own Ollama instance (default, no API key needed).
Use a cloud OpenAI-compatible API instead. Set the key with the "Hearth: Set API Key" command.
hearth.provider.description: Which backend the agent talks to.

hearth.endpoint.description: Ollama server address (service endpoint). Only used when provider is "ollama".

hearth.model.description: Name of the Ollama model used by the agent. Change it via "Hearth: Manage Models" or here directly.

hearth.openaiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API. Only used when provider is "openai" (works with OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, and similar).

hearth.cloudModel.description: Model name to request from the cloud provider. Only used when provider is "openai".

hearth.maxSteps.description: Maximum number of agent steps (tool calls) per request.

enumDescriptions: The agent writes/edits files without asking.
Shows a diff to approve before every write or edit.
The agent is never allowed to write or edit files.
hearth.permissions.write.description: What the agent can do with write_file / edit_file. Change quickly via "Hearth: Permissions".

enumDescriptions: The agent deletes files/folders without asking.
Asks for confirmation before every delete.
The agent is never allowed to delete anything.
hearth.permissions.delete.description: What the agent can do with delete_file.

enumDescriptions: The agent runs shell commands without asking.
Asks for confirmation before every command.
The agent is never allowed to run shell commands.
hearth.permissions.command.description: What the agent can do with run_command.

hearth.dailyBudgetUsd.description: Optional soft daily spend cap for the cloud provider, in USD (0 = disabled). Estimated from published list prices for recognized models — not a real balance check, and resets at midnight. You'll get a heads-up at 80% and again once it's crossed.
